channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former British Ambassador Peter Mandelson Arrested Amid Misconduct Investigation
item.description: Peter Mandelson, the former British ambassador to the United States and ex-government minister, has been arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office. Authorities are investigating allegations...

item.title: North Berwick residents protest against new parking meters amidst widespread vandalism
item.description: The picturesque town of North Berwick has become the centre of intense opposition to the introduction of parking meters by East Lothian Council. Residents, many of whom are elderly, have expressed str...

item.title: Coventry Charity Struggles to Stay Open Amid Declining Donations
item.description: Clothing Coventry, a charity that provides free clothing to vulnerable people and families, is facing possible closure unless it secures additional funding. Established in 2020, the organization relie...

item.title: Christina Applegate Discusses the Challenges of Living with MS and Her Journey Towards Honest Self-Reflection
item.description: Christina Applegate, the Emmy-winning star, shares a deeply personal account of her life since being diagnosed with multiple sclerosis (MS) in 2021. In her memoir, Applegate describes how MS has affec...

item.title: Thirty Swans Found Dead in East London as Authorities Investigate Possible Avian Flu
item.description: Health and environmental authorities are investigating the deaths of 30 swans found in the River Thames over the course of a week, raising concerns about a possible new outbreak of avian flu in the Un...

item.title: FBI Investigates Prior Visit by Suspect Before Nancy Guthrie’s Disappearance
item.description: Authorities investigating the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, mother of NBC News anchor Savannah Guthrie, say that the prime suspect may have been at her home prior to the night she went missing. The ...

item.title: FedEx Seeks Refund of Trump-Era Tariffs Following Supreme Court Ruling
item.description: FedEx has filed a lawsuit seeking a full refund of tariffs imposed under former President Donald Trump's emergency powers. The tariffs, introduced last April on imports from most countries through the...

item.title: The Growing Role of Politics in the Olympics: A Reflection of Today's Divided World
item.description: The 2026 Winter Olympics in Milano Cortina are marked by an increased entanglement of politics and sports. In a year when tensions in the U.S. regarding immigration policies, LGBTQ+ rights, and Presid...

item.title: Campaign Seeks to Make Romanian a GCSE Language Option
item.description: A new campaign is pushing for Romanian to be offered as a GCSE option in the UK, citing the growing number of Romanian speakers in London. According to the 2021 census, Romanian is the second most spo...

item.title: BAFTA Judge Jonte Richardson Resigns Following Controversy Over Racist Slur Incident
item.description: Filmmaker Jonte Richardson has resigned from his role as a BAFTA emerging talent judge, citing the academy's handling of a racial slur incident during the awards ceremony. The slur was uttered involun...

item.title: Samie Elishi and Ciaran Davies Win Love Island: All Stars Series After Six Weeks of Competition
item.description: The winners of Love Island: All Stars have been announced after six weeks of drama, challenges, and recoupling. Samie Elishi and Ciaran Davies emerged as the winners, securing the £50,000 prize follow...

item.title: NASA Revamps Artemis Program to Accelerate Lunar Missions
item.description: NASA is making significant adjustments to the Artemis program in response to delays and increasing competition from China’s space program. Administrator Jared Isaacman announced several key changes ai...

item.title: The uncertain future of Iran after Khamenei's death and regional turmoil
item.description: After a joint attack by the US and Israel, Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has been killed, escalating the already volatile situation in the region. Tehran retaliated with missile and dro...

item.title: Scientists Find New Antibiotic Target in Bacteria, Offering Hope for Superbug Treatment
item.description: Researchers from Caltech have discovered a promising new target for antibiotics in the fight against drug-resistant bacteria, which are responsible for tens of thousands of deaths annually. The study ...

item.title: New Discovery Reveals Unconventional Mechanism of Cell Division in Embryos
item.description: A team of scientists from Technische Universität Dresden has uncovered a surprising new mechanism for how large embryonic cells divide. This discovery challenges the long-held belief that a fully clos...

item.title: France Restricts US Ambassador Charles Kushner's Access to Government Officials After He Skips Summoned Meeting
item.description: Tensions between France and the United States have escalated following a diplomatic incident involving US Ambassador to France Charles Kushner, the father of Jared Kushner and a controversial appointe...

item.title: Scottish Government Rejects Flamingo Land Resort Proposal at Loch Lomond
item.description: The Scottish government has officially rejected plans to build a £40 million Flamingo Land holiday resort on the shores of Loch Lomond. The proposal included a waterpark, monorail, hotel, and restaura...

item.title: BBC Apologises for Airing Racial Slur Due to Tourette's Tic at Baftas, Reveals Another Slur Was Edited Out
item.description: During the 2026 Bafta Film Awards broadcast on BBC, a racial slur (the N-word) was inadvertently aired when Tourette's syndrome campaigner John Davidson shouted it involuntarily as actors Michael B. J...

item.title: Dubai Airport Evacuated After Iranian Suicide Drone Attack
item.description: Dubai International Airport was evacuated after an Iranian suicide drone reportedly struck one of its terminals, causing significant panic. The incident, which took place amid rising tensions in the M...

item.title: Presearch’s Doppelgänger Tool Helps Users Discover Adult Creators Based on Celebrity Looks
item.description: Presearch, a decentralized search engine, has launched a new feature called Doppelgänger, designed to help users discover adult content creators who resemble celebrities or people they find attractive...
